task_desc: Add neuron population counts and connectome compression indicators -- Enhance the existing connectome dot panel and the 3D brain to show the scale of the real connectome behind each group. (1) Add a data structure mapping each of the ~70 neuron groups to its approximate real neuron count from FlyWire data (e.g., MB_KC: ~2000, VIS_ME: ~15000, MN_LEG_L1: ~50), (2) In the connectome dot panel tooltip, append the population count (e.g., "Kenyon cells (odor memory) -- represents ~2,000 neurons"), (3) In the 3D brain hover tooltip, show per-region totals (e.g., "Mushroom Bodies: 6 groups representing ~3,500 neurons"), (4) Add a small summary line in the connectome panel header: "70 groups / ~130K neurons" to make the compression immediately visible. Files: js/main.js, js/brain3d.js, js/education.js.
